name: manage_source
description: Add or remove knowledge source directories. Adding a source will begin indexing all documents in that directory. Removing a source will stop tracking that directory (indexed data is preserved).

action.description: Action to perform: 'add' to register a new source directory, 'remove' to unregister an existing one.

path.description: Directory path to add as a new source. Required when action is 'add'.

source_id.description: ID of the source to remove. Required when action is 'remove'. Use list_sources to find source IDs.
